title: Integrated Watershed Development for Sustainable Development of Rainfed Areas
abstract:
For the greater part of the world, water stress is primarily a blue water issue, and large opportunities exist in the management of
rainfed areas, i.e., the green water resources in the landscape. Dr. Suhas P. Wani, Principal Scientist (Watersheds) and Project
Coordinator (IWMPs), Resilient Dryland Systems, International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics (ICRISAT), India
explains as how an integrated watershed development approach can increase the crop yields 2 - 4 times in rainfed are
